title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology consultation with clear triage, diagnosis-focused decisions, and follow-up in Quito.
heading: Dermatology telemedicine in Quito
lead: Telemedicine helps when it saves time without weakening diagnosis, follow-up, or sound medical judgment.

thesis.title: Remote care when it truly makes the first step easier
thesis.body: The idea is simple: handle what can be guided well online, and move into consultation when looking closer changes the decision.

statement.title: Telemedicine with clear limits and useful guidance

internalMessage.description: We review context, risk, and progression to decide whether remote care is enough or clinic review would be wiser.

blocks.title: How it works
items: You share history, symptoms, and photos taken as clearly as possible.
We review whether the problem can be guided remotely or really needs direct examination.
You receive an initial recommendation, basic care, and a reasonable follow-up window.
If warning signs appear, we bring clinic review forward.

blocks.title: When it often helps
items: Follow-up for active treatment with recent change

blocks.title: When clinic review makes more sense
items: Lesions that change quickly or bleed
Poor response to the first plan
Need for direct examination or procedure

initiatives.title: Reading photos with context
initiatives.copy: Images help more when they come with timing, symptoms, and a clear reason for concern.

initiatives.title: Adjusting before things worsen
initiatives.copy: Remote consultation can move the plan forward without waiting for the next in-person review.

initiatives.title: Moving into clinic without delay
initiatives.copy: If the case changes or leaves real doubt, in-person review becomes the priority.

initiatives.title: Follow-up designed for Quito
initiatives.copy: Telemedicine and clinic visits can complement each other when that serves the case better.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: The form will be back soon. Until then, this visit can still help you decide the first step.
